name: Delta SkyMiles® Blue American Express Card

verdict.text: Free SkyMiles earner — fine as a backup, not a reason to fly Delta

earn_note: No annual fee means no free checked bag either — this card earns SkyMiles slowly and gives up the one benefit (the free bag) that makes the paid Delta tiers worth carrying.

points.note: Same SkyMiles currency as the rest of the Delta lineup — this card is purely about earning it for free, not about any card-side perks.

transfer_partners.highlight: SkyMiles can't be transferred out — they're stuck in Delta's program.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: You can transfer INTO SkyMiles from Amex MR (1:1), Chase UR and Capital One — useful for topping up an award.

insurance.detail: +1 year on warranties of 5 years or less

protection_note: The thinnest protection in the Delta lineup — no trip cancellation, no trip delay, no baggage coverage, and no emergency medical/evacuation assistance. This is a free card with free-card-level protection.
rental_note: Secondary only — put rentals on a card with primary coverage if you rent often.

services.name: In-flight purchase credit
services.detail: 20% back as a statement credit on Delta in-flight food and beverage purchases.

services.name: Pay with Miles discount
services.detail: Up to $50 off a Delta.com flight for every 5,000 miles redeemed via Pay with Miles.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns SkyMiles on their spend (into your account)
No free checked bag on this tier regardless

additional_cards.note: Additional cards are free, same as the rest of the Delta lineup.
